sentence: 这个国家每年的军费支出很高。
pinyin: Zhège guójiā měi nián de jūnfèi zhīchū hěn gāo.
english: This country's annual military expenditure is very high.

meaning: 1. first thing in the morning; 2. at daybreak
sentence: 他清早就出门去买新鲜豆腐了。
pinyin: Tā qīngzǎo jiù chūmén qù mǎi xīnxiān dòufu le.
english: He went out first thing in the morning to buy fresh tofu.

sentence: 他死命抓住绳子，不敢松手。
pinyin: Tā sǐmìng zhuā zhù shéngzi, bù gǎn sōngshǒu.
english: He desperately gripped the rope and didn't dare let go.

meaning: 1. to send on assignment; 2. to deploy (troops)
sentence: 公司调派他去上海分部工作。
pinyin: Gōngsī diàopài tā qù Shànghǎi fēnbù gōngzuò.
english: The company sent him on assignment to the Shanghai branch.

sentence: 他每天通勤需要花将近一个小时。
pinyin: Tā měitiān tōngqín xūyào huā jiāngjìn yī gè xiǎoshí.
english: His daily commute takes nearly an hour.
